info.title: Planable Public API
info.description: REST API for managing Planable companies, workspaces, pages, posts and more.

get.description: Returns 200 if the token is valid and has the read scope.
Returns posts for a workspace with pagination. Each item includes the same post detail fields as GET /posts/{id}.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: Filter by campaign ID, or `no-campaign` for posts not assigned to any campaign

200.description: List of post details with pagination

media.description: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.

post.description: Creates a post in the specified workspace and page. Use `pageId` for a single post or `pageIds` to create grouped cross-page posts. Set `notify` to `false` to suppress external notifications (email, in-app push) for this post creation; internal activity feed entries are always recorded. The `media` field: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.

media.description: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.
Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.

get.description: Returns a single post by ID including media URLs.

media.description: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.

delete.description: Deletes a post in a workspace accessible to the calling token.

patch.description: Updates a post. Published posts are immutable and will return 400. The `media` field: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs. Pass an empty array to clear media. Stories support a single, non-GIF media item; submitting multiple media URLs or a GIF for a story returns 400. Set `archived` to `true` to archive a post or `false` to restore it; archiving removes any active schedule.

media.description: Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.
Up to 20 public image or video URLs, each max 100MB. Files are downloaded server-side from the provided URLs.

400.description: Validation error or post is already published

get.description: Returns the latest metrics snapshot for a published post.

200.description: Latest metrics snapshot for the post

404.description: Post not found or metrics missing

post.description: Triggers a fresh metrics sync for a published post.

200.description: Post metrics sync queued or deduplicated

get.description: Returns whether a post metrics sync is in progress and when metrics last synced.

patch.description: Sets zero-based grid positions for posts using the order of `postIds`. The first ID receives `gridPosition: 0`, the second receives `gridPosition: 1`, and so on.

get.description: Returns the total number of posts across all workspaces the token has access to.

200.description: Total posts count and per-workspace breakdown

get.description: Returns campaigns for a workspace with pagination, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Creates a campaign in a workspace. `description` is supplied as plain text and stored as rich text. Subject to the workspace campaign plan limit.

403.description: Campaign limit reached or insufficient permissions

get.description: Returns a single campaign by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a campaign. Any subset of the create fields may be provided.

delete.description: Deletes a campaign and detaches it from its posts. Posts are kept; only the `campaignId` link is removed.

get.description: Returns all labels for a workspace.

post.description: Creates a new label in a workspace.

get.description: Returns media uploads for a workspace with pagination.

200.description: List of media uploads with pagination

post.description: Accepts 1 to 20 public image or video URLs (each max 100MB) for async download and processing. Returns 202 immediately with processing status for each item.

mediaUrls.description: Array of 1 to 20 public image/video URLs to upload to the workspace media library. Each file max ~100MB.

get.description: Returns a single media upload by ID.

post.description: Triggers a fresh analytics metrics sync for a page.

200.description: Page metrics sync queued or deduplicated

400.description: Page type does not support analytics sync

get.description: Returns whether a page metrics sync is in progress and when metrics last synced.
Returns pages (social channels) the token has access to, with pagination.
Returns paginated raw page metrics snapshots for a date range.

post.description: Creates a single-media Instagram story. GIFs and non-Instagram pages are not supported. Set `notify` to `false` to suppress external notifications; internal activity feed entries are always recorded.

get.description: Returns comments for a post with pagination.

post.summary: Add a comment to a post
post.description: Creates a new comment on a post.

get.description: Returns all workspaces the token has access to.

post.description: Creates a new workspace in the calling token's company.

403.description: Workspace limit reached or insufficient permissions

delete.description: Deletes a workspace in the company associated with the calling token.
